subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: For Class A fire risks in a farm building the requirements of E1D14 need not be provided if—

ol.li: portable fire extinguishers for Class A fire risks are provided in accordance with SA I3D11(2); or

notwithstanding the exemption provided by SA I3D10, a fire hose reel system is provided in accordance with E1D3, or wash-down hoses or similar hoses that are—
not more than 36 m long; and
equipped with a spray nozzle suitable for fighting a fire at the incipient stage; and
permanently connected to a water supply which is sufficient to supply two hoses discharging at the rate of 20 litres per minute for 60 minutes; and
arranged to provide coverage to all points on the floor within.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Portable fire extinguishers provided to comply with SA I3D11(1)(a) must be—

ol.li: located at or adjacent to every required exit; or
in open walled farm buildings, one extinguisher is provided for every 500 m2 of floor area, or part thereof.
